notes: Generates projects/libs/<name> with .npmrc, package.json, tsconfig, src, test, TARGETS.
Includes a default nix_node_test target (unit) using Vitest; opt out of sample tests with --no-tests.
Pass importer=<id> to override default projects/libs/<name> importer.
TARGETS uses nix_node_lib and requires exactly one lockfile label.
